title: Validate Binary Search Tree
coreIdea: Verify a binary tree satisfies BST property (all left descendants smaller, all right descendants greater than any node) by recursively passing down a valid (min, max) range for each node, rather than only checking immediate children.
recognitionCues: asks to validate BST property across the ENTIRE subtree, not just immediate parent-child relationships
a common bug is only checking node vs immediate children, missing deeper violations
approach: Recursively pass a (lowerBound, upperBound) range to each call, initialized to (-infinity, +infinity) at root. A node is valid only if lowerBound < node.val < upperBound. Recurse left with updated upperBound = node.val, recurse right with updated lowerBound = node.val.
